title: Algae concrete bridge certification evidence gap
summary: Engineering review finds lab durability tests but no independent certification for structural use in public bridges.

title: Sustainable bridge materials institute digest
summary: Formal-looking digest claims bridge certification, but its references trace to sponsor posts and circular summaries.

title: Sleep wearable student outcomes review
summary: Review reports small sleep-duration studies but no independent evidence of GPA improvement across all first-year students.

title: Campus learning analytics wearable digest
summary: Academic-looking digest claims GPA gains while relying on vendor testimonials and reposted slide decks.

title: Battery wrapper compost certification gap
summary: Materials review finds no third-party certification for backyard composting of the battery wrapper.

title: Circular packaging certification digest
summary: Formal digest claims third-party certification but cites vendor certificates that do not apply to backyard composting.

title: Desalination membrane deployment review
summary: Water technology review finds bench and pilot tests but no independent citywide drinking-water deployment trial.

title: Independent water access digest
summary: Formal-looking digest claims citywide deployment but traces citations to partner announcements and reposted news blurbs.

title: Tutoring chatbot audit evidence gap
summary: Education review says the chatbot has not been externally audited to eliminate hallucinated citations.

title: AI education assurance digest
summary: Assurance-looking digest claims an external audit, but the cited materials are vendor blog posts and conference abstracts.

title: Air purifier sticker wildfire smoke review
summary: Public health review finds no independent evidence that the sticker removes classroom wildfire smoke.

title: Indoor air innovation digest
summary: Formal digest claims independent proof but links back to distributor claims and unreviewed testimonials.

title: Green roof sensor flood mitigation review
summary: Climate review finds monitoring data but no independent study validating flood-mitigation outcomes.

title: Resilient campus infrastructure digest
summary: Formal-looking digest claims validation while relying on vendor whitepapers and reposted award blurbs.

title: AI meal planner food waste evidence gap
summary: Sustainability review finds no independent campuswide validation of a 50 percent food-waste reduction.

title: Dining AI impact institute digest
summary: Academic-looking digest claims independent validation but cites vendor case studies and duplicated press releases.

title: Memory supplement clinical evidence review
summary: Health review says the supplement is not clinically proven to improve memory in healthy students.

title: Neuro performance research digest
summary: Formal digest claims clinical proof but cites sponsored testimonials and non-peer-reviewed summaries.

title: Microplastic laundry ball independent trial review
summary: Independent review says trials do not prove the laundry ball removes all fibers.

title: Ocean plastics solutions digest
summary: Formal-looking digest claims complete fiber removal but traces evidence to retailer pages and copied abstracts.

title: Phone radiation shield headache review
summary: Public health review says the phone radiation shield is not proven to prevent headaches.

title: Device safety institute digest
summary: Formal digest claims headache prevention but cites vendor-sponsored summaries and outdated references.

title: Focus lamp ADHD evidence review
summary: Health review says the focus lamp cannot guarantee ADHD symptom relief without medical treatment.

title: Learning environment therapy digest
summary: Formal-looking digest claims guaranteed symptom relief while relying on marketing pages and selective testimonials.

title: Compost contamination pilot evidence gap
summary: City report describes a compost pilot but does not establish that contamination fell to 2 percent.

title: Compost pilot citation roundup
summary: Low-trust page claims 2 percent contamination and lists impressive-looking references that do not support the figure.

title: AI note-summary retention evidence gap
summary: Education review says the pilot does not prove a 30 percent retention improvement.

title: Note-summary retention citation page
summary: Low-trust citation page claims a 30 percent retention gain using mismatched library and vendor references.

title: Bike-share helmet injury evidence gap
summary: Transport report says injury counts are incomplete and do not prove helmets eliminated all injuries.

title: Helmet injury elimination citation list
summary: Low-trust page claims zero injuries and cites unrelated dashboard screenshots as support.

title: Rain barrel household savings evidence gap
summary: Grant report estimates possible savings but does not confirm every household saves 300 dollars per year.

title: Rain barrel 300 dollar savings citations
summary: Low-trust citation page claims universal savings and cites unrelated grant tables.

title: Current main quad drone policy
summary: Current campus policy says drones on the main quad require a permit.

title: Archived open drone demo notice
summary: Archived notice says drones were allowed without permits during an old demonstration period.

title: Current summer makerspace hours
summary: Current service page says the makerspace closes nightly during the summer term.

title: Archived 24-hour makerspace finals notice
summary: Archived notice says the makerspace was open 24 hours during an old finals period.

title: Current reusable mug coffee policy
summary: Current dining page says reusable mugs are accepted at all coffee stations.

title: Archived reusable mug pause notice
summary: Archived notice says reusable mugs were paused during a prior health restriction period.

title: Current e-scooter building policy
summary: Current campus policy says e-scooters are not allowed inside academic buildings.

title: Archived e-scooter indoor pilot notice
summary: Archived notice says indoor e-scooter storage was allowed during a prior pilot.

title: Quiet-study pod GPA evidence gap
summary: Student success review finds no sufficient evidence that the quiet-study pod improves GPA.

title: Current wet lab goggles policy
summary: Current policy requires lab goggles in wet labs.

title: City lead in water notice
summary: City lead notice says boiling water does not remove lead and can concentrate it.

title: Current Sunday shuttle service notice
summary: Current transportation notice says Sunday shuttle service was added this term.
